name: Ansell Limited
analysis: ANN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$30.1400. Trade idea: entry A$31.4700, stop A$28.3239, target A$40.9083 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
